title: Tales of Tomorrow
overview: In 2165, Michele's kidnapping puts the city-state Porto 01, the last stronghold of human civilization, in a state of war. The problem is that to save Porto 01 it will be necessary to count on the help of Jefferson, a high school student who lives in 1999.
